ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of Petition For Final Distribution Or Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-08-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Broitman for Dennis Wishnie (Executor).

Mr. Broitman presented an endorsed filed copy of a decelartion that he filed this morning and explained the difficulty in selling the property (5/6 units). In addition, Mr. Briotman stated that if the commissions fee for the sixth unit is not approved, then it can go back into the reserve and addressed the issue of extraordinary fees. The acounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy McConico.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Authority To Purchase Estate Real Property With Consent Of All Heirs And Devises
Off Calendar Sep-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Bugatto for and with Dennis Wishine (Executor). Conrad Donner for and with Dennis Wishine (Purchaser).

The Parties explained who would be residing in the property, which units were being purchased by the Co-Tenants, the percentage interest of each unit and that the Bank would not allow Mr. Wishine to sign loan documents without getting authorization from the Court allowing him to purchase the property. In addition, the Parties explained that the it would be as Tenants in Common, that there were difficulties in financing, that there could not be a purchase of one unit unless all units were being sold, explained the terms of the purchase agreement and the other alternatives of funding for Mr. Wishine. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
